FormControlEventHandler(formControlStr(PurchRFQVendReply, ccHasTextblock_Line), FormControlEventType::Clicked), SuppressBPWarning('BPParameterNotUsed', 'Parameter required by the event interface.')] public static void ccHasTextblock_OnClicked(FormControl _sender, FormControlEventArgs _e) { Args args = new Args(); args.record(_sender.dataSourceObject().cursor()); args.caller(_sender.formRun()); if (args.record().RecId) { new MenuFunction(MenuItemDisplayStr(FWFTextBlockValue), MenuItemType::Display).run(args); } else { warning(strFmt("@FWFTextBlock:WarningRecordMissing" , tableId2PName(args.record().TableId))); } }
